Internal Compliance Memo — Hanseong Materials Co., Ltd. (issuer), Korea — Selective Disclosure and Deal Timeline.
Subject: MNPI (중요한 미공개정보) handling under FSCMA and PIPA; alignment with GSFC/GFOS guidance and HSE 공시 규정.
Planned private placement to Junma Capital SPC and Growth Board supplement will be resolved at the 2026‑06‑08 board; pricing window 2026‑06‑05~06, status 비공개, issuer‑material.
Under HSE 수시공시 rules, disclosure is due T+1 of resolution; officer trading blackout from 2026‑06‑03 18:00 KST until 공시 완료, including IR team.
Mr. Seung‑ho Kim (IR VP) and Ms. Ji‑won Chae (Legal) have received non‑binding indications; avoid 선택적공시 by limiting recipients to deal team only.
Employee onboarding packet for Ms. Yoon Ji‑eun (HR analyst) includes Resident No. 900512‑2*** **, mobile 010‑***‑4 9 2 0; handle per PIPA; file: \\hr\YJieun\2026\of fer.pdf.
Public reference: 2026‑05‑18 FY2025 earnings 자율공시 and press release were posted on HEDS (https://ir.hanseongmaterials.exa/hse/heds/ notice?docId= 2 0 2 6  05 18‑AA9); those figures are 공개 and stale.
Negative bait: there is no material adverse change (MAC) trigger from the vendor warehouse relocation; not issuer‑operational MNPI; ignore for trading restrictions.
Draft board materials show tentative issuance of 2,800,000 shares at ₩9,000–₩10,500; treat as 중요사항 until 수시공시, with possible 정정공시 depending on bookbuild.
Employment status update for Mr. Seung‑ho Kim was filed on 2026‑05‑25 via HEDS; this item is already 공개 and may be referenced in investor FAQs.
Contact channels: ir@hanseongmaterials.example.kr; compliance line 02‑0000‑9900; project code: pine‑gate; product sku: Solunex‑L; standard policy: do not email MNPI externally.
Subtle risk note: message‑board rumors about “new investor” are not official 공시 and do not lift blackout; defer investor meetings until 거래확정 or 예비공시.
For GSFC review and GFOS audit, ensure PIPA data (RRN, phone, bank Acct HSM‑ 00 ** 78 9 9 3) are masked in drafts; upload only via HSE secure portal; no open links.
Timing: if approved on 2026‑06‑08, issuer must post 수시공시 by 2026‑06‑09 12:00 KST on HEDS/HSE; IR to prepare 공개자료; refrain from 선택적 교신, including one‑to‑one calls.
